name: Peruvian Frequencies
description: MatchMyFreq Society Presents: Peruvian Frequencies Come celebrate Peruvian Independence Day with us for a night of music, community, and connection <3 Featuring an all-Peruvian DJ lineup showcasing local talent across house, techno, and more. Each DJ brings their own unique style and energy, creating a night of different frequencies to experience. Come solo, bring your friends, meet new people, and support local Peruvian DJs as we celebrate through music! Free Entry. Let's Party! 6PM-12AM

name: CMPLTLYGONE X STRUCTURE
description: Structure NYC invites B-SiiDE (@bsiide_) for an ambient and minimal techno set followed by Megan Rosengarten (@megan.rosengarten) stepping in with stripped-back techno and electro brought onboard by CMPLTLYGONE. Respective organizers Aleska (@aleskaecho) brings a moody & dreamy techno set and Wren’s Lullaby (@wren1slullaby) with spooky techno closing.
address: 1271 Myrtle Ave; Brooklyn, NY 11221; United States
